findings.message: Test file tests/unit/app_server/test_live_status_app_conversation_service.py was modified but no source file changed in this PR. If the PR claims to fix a failing test, the change likely edits the test rather than the failing implementation.

pr.title: Update openhands-agent-server to 1.23.1 and remove openhands-aci dependency
pr.body:
## Summary

This PR updates the `openhands-agent-server` dependency to version `1.23.1` and removes the unused `openhands-aci` dependency from the project.

## Changes

- **Updated `openhands-agent-server`**: From `1.22.1` to `1.23.1` in both:
  - `[project]` section (`dependencies` list)
  - `[tool.poetry.dependencies]` section (V1 dependencies)
- **Removed `openhands-aci`**: Removed `openhands-aci==0.3.3` from both:
  - `[project]` section (`dependencies` list)
  - `[tool.poetry.dependencies]` section

This PR is part of the regular dependency updates to keep OpenHands up-to-date with the latest agent server features and removes a dependency that is no longer used.

@VascoSch92 can click here to [continue refining the PR](https://app.all-hands.dev/conversations/4115972a-4f26-49a3-9b66-2a0b13fc09de)

---

To run this PR locally, use the following command:

GUI with Docker:
```
docker run -it --rm   -p 3000:3000   -v /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock   --add-host host.docker.internal:host-gateway   --name openhands-app-a13c477   docker.openhands.dev/openhands/openhands:a13c477
```
pr.author: VascoSch92
